hero.title: Leave Planner
hero.description: Plan personal leave, define allowances, and understand used, planned, and remaining balances.

flow.title: Define → Plan → Review
steps: Plan full or half weekday leave

differences.title: Personal leave planning without a full HR system
differences.description: Keep allowances and absence records together with explicit calculation rules.

items.title: Define allowances
items.description: Create active or historical leave types with carry-forward values.

items.title: Plan clearly
items.description: Record dates, half days, reasons, and user-managed statuses.

items.title: Understand balances
items.description: Separate consumed leave from planned or pending leave.

feel.title: A clear personal view of time away
feel.description: Review upcoming and historical leave without employer administration.

items.title: Focused
items.description: Search and filter the records that matter.

items.title: Explicit
items.description: Weekends, half days, overlap, and balance rules are documented.

items.title: Private
items.description: Records remain scoped to the authenticated owner.

audiences.title: Who uses Leave Planner
audiences.description: For individuals organizing their own leave records.

items.title: Employees
items.description: Keep a personal record beside an employer portal.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Plan time away against self-defined allowances.

items.title: Career changers
items.description: Maintain a simple personal leave history.

resourceSection.title: Leave planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Two protected record types keep V1 understandable.

items.title: Leave types
items.description: Define allowances, carry-forward, and active state.

items.title: Leave entries
items.description: Create, edit, search, filter, review, and delete personal leave.

items.title: Balances
items.description: See used, planned, remaining, and upcoming totals.

groupedSection.title: Transparent calculation rules
groupedSection.description: Balances are planning estimates based on user-entered information.

items.name: Consumed
items.description: Approved and taken entries reduce remaining balance.

items.name: Not consumed
items.description: Cancelled and rejected entries do not reduce balance.

technicalSection.title: Built for private personal records
technicalSection.description: Leave Planner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Generated API contracts and shared form/confirmation patterns.
No HR approval, payroll, legal entitlement, calendar, notification, AI, or third-party integration.

finalCta.title: Ready to plan leave?
finalCta.description: Open Leaves and define the first allowance.
